task_prompt: I already have kelet installed but I'm not seeing sessions in the console
app_description: FastAPI + pydantic-ai. Has kelet in deps and configure() called. But agentic_session() is missing — each LLM call shows as a separate unlinked trace.
root_cause: kelet.configure() missing at startup; agentic_session() missing from both POST /chat streaming generator and GET /chat stateless endpoint — pydantic-ai spans emitted as isolated unlinked traces
diagnosis_accuracy: correct — skill correctly identified both missing configure() and missing agentic_session(), and correctly diagnosed that pydantic-ai requires explicit agentic_session() wrapping even though it is a supported auto-instrumented framework
streaming_boundary_note: skill correctly wrapped entire generator body in agentic_session() context including DONE sentinel — matches the common-mistakes entry for trailing spans silently lost
stateless_endpoint_note: skill correctly generated a per-request UUID for GET /chat to prevent orphaned spans
